description:
🕒 18:00–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-agano-hotaru/

Come see Genji fireflies dancing over the Koma River and kajika frogs calling with their distinctive high voices (named for their deer-like cry). You'll stroll through the historic streetscape of the old post town and enjoy organic vegetable curry inside a 160-year-old traditional house—a designated Important Architectural Heritage site of Hanno.

【Fee】Adults ¥3,000 | Junior high school and under ¥1,500 (includes guide, insurance, dinner)

【Capacity】10 people per date

【Guide】Yoshishige Okawara (Agano Post Town Revitalization and Agano Story Group)

【What to bring】Flashlight, rain gear, water bottle, long sleeves, long pants, comfortable walking shoes

【More information】COM Station website: https://aganojuku.jimdofree.com/
location: 集合 古民家ゲストハウス吾野宿（西武池袋線・秩父線「吾野駅」下車徒歩7分）
summary: Walk through Agano post town and view Genji fireflies and kajika frogs in the Koma River
